summary: Frontend testing of new security and availability features for KiloLab. Verified: 1) Menu hamburger has 'Paramètres' link to /account-settings (visible when logged in), 2) AccountSettings page with 4 tabs (Profil, Notifications, Sécurité, Supprimer), 3) Account deletion protection checks for active orders and pending payouts, 4) WasherDashboard has 'Gérer mes disponibilités' button, 5) WasherAvailability component with vacation mode, working hours, and planned absences.
passed_tests: Navbar.tsx - 'Paramètres' link exists at line 178-181, links to /account-settings
Navbar.tsx - Link shows 🔒 emoji and 'Paramètres' text (visible when user is logged in)
AccountSettings.tsx - Route exists at /account-settings (App.tsx line 265-270)
AccountSettings.tsx - Protected by PrivateRoute (redirects unauthenticated users)
AccountSettings.tsx - 4 tabs implemented: Profil, Notifications, Sécurité, Supprimer (lines 262-265)
AccountSettings.tsx - Profile tab with full_name, phone, address, city, postal_code fields
AccountSettings.tsx - Notifications tab with email_orders, email_marketing, push_enabled toggles
AccountSettings.tsx - Security tab with password reset and global logout options
AccountSettings.tsx - Delete tab with fraud protection checks
AccountSettings.tsx - checkCanDeleteAccount function checks for active orders (lines 92-104)
AccountSettings.tsx - checkCanDeleteAccount checks pending payouts for washers (lines 106-129)
AccountSettings.tsx - Delete blocked if active orders exist (status: pending, assigned, picked_up, washing, ready)
AccountSettings.tsx - Delete blocked if washer has pending_payout > 0
AccountSettings.tsx - Delete blocked if washer's last_payout_date < 30 days ago
AccountSettings.tsx - Delete requires typing 'SUPPRIMER' to confirm
AccountSettings.tsx - Deletion anonymizes data instead of hard delete (GDPR compliance)
WasherDashboard.tsx - 'Gérer mes disponibilités' button exists (line 598-604)
WasherDashboard.tsx - Button opens WasherAvailability modal (showAvailability state)
WasherDashboard.tsx - WasherAvailability component imported and rendered (lines 19, 668)
WasherAvailability.tsx - Vacation mode toggle with start/end dates (lines 58-60, 234-265)
WasherAvailability.tsx - Working hours schedule for all 7 days (DEFAULT_SCHEDULE lines 42-50)
WasherAvailability.tsx - Each day has enabled toggle, start time, end time
WasherAvailability.tsx - Planned absences list with add/remove functionality (lines 66, 138-156)
WasherAvailability.tsx - Absences have start_date, end_date, reason fields
WasherAvailability.tsx - Save button persists all settings to Supabase washers table

code_verification.account_settings_tabs: AccountSettings.tsx lines 262-265: profile, notifications, security, delete tabs
code_verification.delete_protection_orders: AccountSettings.tsx lines 92-104: checks orders table for active statuses
code_verification.delete_protection_payouts: AccountSettings.tsx lines 106-129: checks washers.pending_payout and last_payout_date
code_verification.availability_button: WasherDashboard.tsx lines 598-604: 'Gérer mes disponibilités' button with Plane icon
code_verification.availability_modal: WasherDashboard.tsx lines 652-671: modal with WasherAvailability component
code_verification.vacation_mode: WasherAvailability.tsx lines 218-265: vacation mode section with date inputs
code_verification.working_hours: WasherAvailability.tsx lines 267-312: weekly schedule with time inputs
code_verification.planned_absences: WasherAvailability.tsx lines 314-398: absences list with add form

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Account deletion uses data anonymization instead of hard delete (GDPR compliant)
Good: Multiple fraud protection checks before allowing account deletion
Good: 30-day waiting period after last payout for washer account deletion
Good: WasherAvailability component properly saves all settings to Supabase
Good: Vacation mode automatically blocks new missions when active
Good: Working hours use sensible defaults (Mon-Fri 8-18h, Sat 9-14h, Sun closed)
test_credentials: No test credentials available - features require authentication to test UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified in code: 1) Hamburger menu has 'Paramètres' link (visible when logged in), 2) /account-settings page with 4 tabs and fraud protection for deletion, 3) WasherDashboard has 'Gérer mes disponibilités' button that opens availability modal, 4) WasherAvailability component with vacation mode, weekly schedule, and planned absences. All features require authentication to test UI interactions.
